title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Earnings Report: Historical Performance and Surprise Analysis
text: Canopy Growth has historically struggled with earnings consistency. In recent quarters, company missed earnings in December 2024 and March 2025, but beat earnings in June 2025 and September 2025. For the quarter ending June 2024, Canopy announced earnings of negative $0.37 per share versus consensus estimate of negative $0.31, representing surprise of 19.35% beat. For December 2023 quarter, company posted loss of $1.79 per share versus expected $0.45, delivering surprise of negative 297.78% miss. Over the last four quarters, company has beaten consensus EPS estimates just once, indicating poor track record of beating expectations. Pattern shows company consistently surprises to downside on earnings, creating investor uncertainty. Recent improvements in adjusted EBITDA losses suggest operational improvements but path to profitability remains challenging.
